opinion.h: BREZA v. CITY OF TRIMONT , 435 U.S. 963 (1978)
Minnie Bryan BREZA, appellant, v. CITY OF TRIMONT No. 77-1188
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari denied.[ Breza v. City of Trimont 435 U.S. 963 (1978) ]
